Name: UStaticMesh
Description:
A StaticMesh is a piece of geometry that consists of a static set of polygons.
  Static Meshes can be translated, rotated, and scaled, but they cannot have their vertices animated in any way. As such, they are more efficient
  to render than other types of geometry such as USkeletalMesh, and they are often the basic building block of levels created in the engine.
 
  @see AStaticMeshActor, UStaticMeshComponent

Variables.Name: PerLODBiasTypeInfo
Variables.Description: When autonomous or simulated pawn needs special LOD bias

Variables.Name: MinLOD
Variables.Description: Minimum LOD to use for rendering.  This is the default setting for the mesh and can be overridden by component settings.

Variables.Name: Materials_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Materials used by this static mesh. Individual sections index in to this array.

Variables.Name: LightMapCoordinateIndex
Variables.Description: The light map coordinate index

Variables.Name: DistanceFieldSelfShadowBias
Variables.Description: Useful for reducing self shadowing from distance field methods when using world position offset to animate the mesh's vertices.

Variables.Name: bGenerateMeshDistanceField
Variables.Description:
Whether to generate a distance field for this mesh, which can be used by DistanceField Indirect Shadows.
	  This is ignored if the project's 'Generate Mesh Distance Fields' setting is enabled.

Variables.Name: bLazyLoadBulkData
Variables.Description: Lazy load bulk data for reduce memory used

Variables.Name: bAllowMinLodBiasCfg
Variables.Description: allow MinLodBias for global config (r.StaticMeshMinLodBias)

Variables.Name: LODForCollision
Variables.Description:
Specifies which mesh LOD to use for complex (per-poly) collision.
	 	Sometimes it can be desirable to use a lower poly representation for collision to reduce memory usage, improve performance and behaviour.
	 	Collision representation does not change based on distance to camera.

Variables.Name: CullingScreenSize
Variables.Description: Culling screen size

Variables.Name: ScreenSizeCullingRoughDistance
Variables.Description: Rough Distance of Screen size Culling

Variables.Name: bIsGrass
Variables.Description: grass flag, we need this special flag since grasses are so important in pubg game

Variables.Name: bStripComplexCollisionForConsole_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description:
If true, strips unwanted complex collision data aka kDOP tree when cooking for consoles.
		On the Playstation 3 data of this mesh will be stored in video memory.

Variables.Name: bHasNavigationData
Variables.Description:
If true, mesh will have NavCollision property with additional data for navmesh generation and usage.
	    Set to false for distant meshes (always outside navigation bounds) to save memory on collision data.

Variables.Name: bIsStreamable
Variables.Description: Streamable flag, determine whether to split the lod serialization, WITH_STREAMING_SM_LOD

Variables.Name: LpvBiasMultiplier
Variables.Description: Bias multiplier for Light Propagation Volume lighting

Variables.Name: bAllowCPUAccess
Variables.Description:
If true, will keep geometry data CPU-accessible in cooked builds, rather than uploading to GPU memory and releasing it from CPU memory.
	 	This is required if you wish to access StaticMesh geometry data on the CPU at runtime in cooked builds (e.g. to convert StaticMesh to ProceduralMeshComponent)

Variables.Name: Sockets
Variables.Description:
Array of named socket locations, set up in editor and used as a shortcut instead of specifying
	 	everything explicitly to AttachComponent in the StaticMeshComponent.

Variables.Name: PositiveBoundsExtension
Variables.Description: Bound extension values in the positive direction of XYZ, positive value increases bound size

Variables.Name: NegativeBoundsExtension
Variables.Description: Bound extension values in the negative direction of XYZ, positive value increases bound size

Variables.Name: ExtendedBounds
Variables.Description: Original mesh bounds extended with PositiveNegativeBoundsExtension

Variables.Name: ElementToIgnoreForTexFactor
Variables.Description:
Index of an element to ignore while gathering streaming texture factors.
	  This is useful to disregard automatically generated vertex data which breaks texture factor heuristics.

Variables.Name: AssetUserData
Variables.Description: Array of user data stored with the asset

Variables.Name: NavCollision
Variables.Description: Pre-build navigation collision

Variables.Name: SimpleMaterials
Variables.Description: Simple material setting

Variables.Name: SourceModels
Variables.Description: Imported raw mesh bulk data.

Variables.Name: MeshDescriptions
Variables.Description: Container holding mesh descriptions for each LOD

Variables.Name: SectionInfoMap
Variables.Description: Map of LOD+Section index to per-section info.

Variables.Name: OriginalSectionInfoMap
Variables.Description:
We need the OriginalSectionInfoMap to be able to build mesh in a non destructive way. Reduce has to play with SectionInfoMap in case some sections disappear.
	  This member will be update in the following situation
	  1. After a static mesh importreimport
	  2. Postload, if the OriginalSectionInfoMap is empty, we will fill it with the current SectionInfoMap
	 
	  We do not update it when the user shuffle section in the staticmesh editor because the OriginalSectionInfoMap must always be in sync with the saved rawMesh bulk data.

Variables.Name: LODGroup
Variables.Description: The LOD group to which this mesh belongs.

Variables.Name: bAutoComputeLODScreenSize
Variables.Description: If true, the screen sizees at which LODs swap are computed automatically.

Variables.Name: ImportVersion
Variables.Description: The last import version

Variables.Name: LightmapUVVersion
Variables.Description: The lightmap UV generation version used during the last derived data build

Variables.Name: Id_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: The following is unique identifier for UStaticMesh. for generating cache key.

Variables.Name: bIsUsedInLandscapeFlaten
Variables.Description: Whether to Flaten Landscape

Variables.Name: FlattenXHalfLength
Variables.Description: Default to Bound.X0.5 + 100

Variables.Name: FlattenYHalfLength
Variables.Description: Default to Bound.Y0.5 + 100

Variables.Name: FlattenZHeight
Variables.Description: Default to 0

Variables.Name: FlattenFallOffDistance
Variables.Description: Default to 1000

Variables.Name: AssetImportData
Variables.Description: Importing data and options used for this mesh

Variables.Name: SourceFilePath_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Path to the resource used to construct this static mesh

Variables.Name: SourceFileTimestamp_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: DateTime-stamp of the file from the last import

Variables.Name: ThumbnailInfo
Variables.Description: Information for thumbnail rendering

Variables.Name: EditorCameraPosition
Variables.Description: The stored camera position to use as a default for the static mesh editor

Variables.Name: bCustomizedCollision
Variables.Description: If the user has modified collision in any way or has custom collision imported. Used for determining if to auto generate collision on import

Variables.Name: OccluderMesh
Variables.Description: Specifies the custom occluder mesh for software occlusion

Variables.Name: LightmapType
Variables.Description: Controls the Lightmap type used by the Component when creating an Actor from this StaticMesh

Variables.Name: bGenerateSurfaceSample
Variables.Description: Controls whether the Component generates surface samples (VolumeProbeGI) when creating an Actor from this StaticMesh

Functions.Name: GetNumLODs
Functions.Description: Returns the number of LODs used by the mesh.

Functions.Name: GetBounds
Functions.Description: Returns the number of bounds of the mesh.

Return.Description: The bounding box represented as box origin with extents and also a sphere that encapsulates that box

Functions.Name: GetBoundingBox
Functions.Description: Returns the bounding box, in local space including bounds extension(s), of the StaticMesh asset

Functions.Name: GetNumSections
Functions.Description: Returns number of Sections that this StaticMesh has, in the supplied LOD (LOD 0 is the highest)

Functions.Name: GetMaterial
Functions.Description: Gets a Material given a Material Index and an LOD number

Functions.Name: GetMaterialIndex
Functions.Description: Gets a Material index given a slot name
